title: Retired Belgian Diplomat, 93, Faces Trial Over 1961 Killing of Congolese Leader
summary_full: A Brussels court ruled that Étienne Davignon must stand trial for the murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of the Democratic Republic of Congo.
summary_public: A Brussels court ruled that Étienne Davignon must stand trial for the murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of the Democratic Republic of Congo.
